title: The data for the paper entitled "non-averaged single-molecule tertiary structures reveal RNA self-folding through individual-particle cryo-electron tomography"
author: Jianfang, Liu

description: Cryo-ET raw images, tilt series, 3D reconstructions and fitting models with EMDB reports, shown in the figures of the paper entitled "Non-averaged single-molecule tertiary structures reveal RNA self-folding through individual-particle cryo-electron tomography"
